channel.title: Physics - Atmospheric and Oceanic Physics | Denis Sergeev

item.title: 3D Simulations of the Archean Earth Including Photochemical Haze Profiles
item.description: Add the full text or supplementary notes for the publication here using Markdown formatting.

item.title: Simulations of idealised 3D atmospheric flows on terrestrial planets using LFRic-Atmosphere
item.description: 3D climate models are one of the best tools we have to study atmospheres of newly discovered exoplanets. Here, we apply LFRic-Atmosphere, a new model developed by the Met Office, to seven different scenarios for terrestrial planetary climates, including four for TRAPPIST-1e, a primary target for future observations. LFRic-Atmosphere reproduces these scenarios within the spread of the existing models across a range of key climatic variables, justifying its use in future exoplanet studies.

item.title: 3D Climate Simulations of the Archean Find That Methane has a Strong Cooling Effect at High Concentrations
A modern-day Mars climate in the Met Office Unified Model: dry simulations
